properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V1 C2 V3 V4 V5 V4 V5 V6 C2

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: The Lord bless you And keep you Make His face shine upon you And be gracious to you The Lord turn his Face toward you And give you peace

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Amen, amen, amen, Amen, amen, amen.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: May His favor be upon you And a thousand generations And your family and your children And their children, and their children

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: May His presence go before you And behind you and beside you All around you and within you He is with you, He is with you

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: In the morning, In the evening In your coming, and your going In your weeping, and rejoicing He is for you, he is for you
